title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know
Dry Bulk Spot Rate Volatility Points to Ongoing Positional Imbalances Amidst Solid Volumes - After bottoming in the high-teens, the Capesize Spot Index posted a solid recovery , pushing freight rates back towards the high-20,000 level, in line with where the futures market has been trading for weeks now. Read More
Doric Weekly Market Insight
The cumulative volume of China's steel exports in the first four months of the year reached the highest level for the same period since 2016. This follows a strong performance in the January-March period, during which total exports hit an eight-year high.
